acholi.metallic_fm_bell_tone: Tone me FM bell calo nyonyo
acholi.barry_harris_1929_2021_codified_bebop_: Barry Harris (1929-2021) oketo cik me harmony pa bebop. System mere tiyo ki chords me 6th ka ma pe 7th ci omedo diminished passing chords i kin degrees me scale wek voice leading obed mayot.
acholi.attack_time_to_reach_full_volume_decay: Attack: kare me o i volume ma opong. Decay: kare me lor nio i sustain. Sustain: rwom me volume ma kimako. Release: kare me to woko ka i weko key.
acholi.a_scale_is_an_ordered_set_of_pitches_m: Scale obedo lanyut me pitches ma kiketo ki lok. Modes gin lokke me scale ma cakke ki degrees mapatpat. Moo acel acel keto tam mapat.
acholi.chords_are_built_by_stacking_intervals: Chords kigero ki keto intervals (3rds) i wi acel acel. Major tiyo ki major 3rd + minor 3rd. Minor loko gi. Chords ma dongo medo 7ths, 9ths, ki ma kato.
acholi.kicks_use_a_sine_oscillator_with_a_pit: Kicks tiyo ki sine oscillator ma tye ki pitch sweep. Snares riibo noise (ma kiyeyo) + kom pa tone. Hi-hats tiyo ki noise bursts me high-pass ma kiyeyo.
acholi.4_4_4_quarter_note_beats_per_bar_most_: 4/4 = beats 4 me quarter-note i bar acel (ma dwong loyo). 3/4 = tam me waltz. 6/8 = compound duple. 5/4 ki 7/8 keto grooves ma pe rom, ma gire.
acholi.keys_arranged_by_ascending_5ths_clockw: Keys kiketo ki 5ths ma dok malo i yo me cawa. Keys ma cok ribo notes 6 me 7. Wot i yo me cawa medo sharps; yo ma kato medo flats.
acholi.every_musical_sound_contains_overtones: Dwon me music ducu tye ki overtones malo pa fundamental. Teko gi ma rom keto timbre — mumiyo trumpet winnye mapat ki flute i pitch acel.
acholi.an_interval_is_the_distance_between_tw: Interval obedo bor i kin pitches aryo, kipimo ki semitones. Ratio me frequency keto consonance (ratios mayot calo 3:2 winnye mayot).
acholi.plays_chord_notes_one_at_a_time_in_seq: Goyo notes me chord acel acel i lok. Malo = piny nio malo, Piny = malo nio piny. Keto patterns ma cwe woko ki chords ma ocung.
acholi.a_filter_removes_frequencies_above_low: Filter kwanyo frequencies malo (lowpass), piny (highpass), onyo but (bandpass) me cutoff frequency. Resonance (Q) medo teko me frequencies ma cok ki cutoff, ci keto got.
acholi.tremolo_periodic_volume_changes_amplit: Tremolo: alokaloka me volume ma dwogo (amplitude modulation). Vibrato: alokaloka me pitch ma dwogo (frequency modulation). Aryo ducu kigengo ki LFO (Low Frequency Oscillator).
acholi.discovered_in_1983_a_noise_burst_feeds: Kinongo i 1983. Noise burst donyo i delay line ma cek loyo ma tye ki feedback. Kare me delay keto pitch. Filter ma tye i feedback loop gengo maleng ki to. I yo me lobo goyo strings ma kigoyo.
acholi.the_sequencer_is_a_composition_tool_ea: Sequencer obedo gin tic me cwec music. Step acel acel nyuto pokpok me beat. Row me melody keto notes ma tye ki pitch, drums medo rhythm. Notation me music nyuto gin ma icweyo.
acholi.notes_on_lines_and_spaces_represent_pi: Notes ma tye i lines ki spaces nyuto pitches. Kare kinyuto ki kit me note: ma opong (○), nucu (𝅗𝅥), quarter (♩), eighth (♪). Staff tiyo ki lines 5.
acholi.try_to_match_this_pattern: Tem me ribo ki pattern man!
acholi.equal_temperament_12_notes_per_octave_: Equal temperament: notes 12 i octave, ratio 2^(1/12). A4 = 440 Hz; A5 = 880 Hz. Well-Tempered Clavier pa Bach (1722) omiyo lobo oye lok man. Note acel acel ma igoyo kany bedo i grid man.
acholi.scales_the_major_minor_modal_grammar: Scales — grammar me major + minor + modal
acholi.major_w_w_h_w_w_w_h_minor_w_h_w_w_h_w_: Major: W-W-H-W-W-W-H. Minor: W-H-W-W-H-W-W. Modes 7 (Ionian, Dorian, Phrygian, Lydian, Mixolydian, Aeolian, Locrian) a ki lokke me pattern me interval pa major-scale.
acholi.triads_root_third_fifth_major_4_3_semi: Triads: root + third + fifth. Major (semitones 4+3), minor (3+4), diminished (3+3), augmented (4+4). Chords me 7th medo third mukene. Music me pop = chords ~6 ma dwogo; jazz tiyo ki extensions ki substitutions.
acholi.sustained_chord_textures_the_bed_under: Textures me chord ma mako — kitanda ma tye piny me score me cinema ducu cok. Tem iv-V-i i minor, onyo i-VI-VII pi tam pa Hans Zimmer. Drones i fifths gengo cik me classical me India ki me bagpipe.
acholi.beat_pad_sample_based_drums: Beat Pad — drums ma tye i wi samples
acholi.most_popular_music_sits_at_4_4_90_130_: Music ma dwong loyo tye i 4/4, 90-130 BPM. Hip-hop ~85-95, house 120-130, drum-and-bass ~170 (tam me half-time). Kick i 1+3, snare i 2+4 = backbeat — mutok me rock + pop.
acholi.theory_the_math_behind_the_sound: Theory — kwan me namba ma tye i ngei dwon
acholi.pythagoras_500_bce_discovered_consonan: Pythagoras (~500 BCE) onongo consonance ki ratios me frequency me namba ma opong: octave 2:1, fifth 3:2, fourth 4:3. Helmholtz omedo man i 1862. Dwon = waves me diyo; music = patterns ma waye lwongo ni ber.
acholi.full_chord_grid_strum_plate_and_voice_: Chord grid ma opong, strum plate, ki voice presets
acholi.drag_across_strings_to_strum: Ywai i wi strings me strum!
acholi.frequency_modulation_fm_synthesis_uses: Frequency Modulation (FM) synthesis tiyo ki oscillator acel (modulator) me loko oyot frequency pa mukene (carrier). Ratio me modulator:carrier keto harmonic content. Ratios mayot (1:1, 2:1, 3:1) keto harmonic tones. Ratios ma tek keto dwon me nyonyo, calo gong, onyo ma pe harmonic. Yamaha DX7 omiyo FM ongec i 1983.
acholi.supersaw_stacks_multiple_sawtooth_osci: SuperSaw riibo sawtooth oscillators mapol ma kidetune manok ki kacel. Man keto dwon madit, malac, ma ryeny — lanyut me EDM, trance, ki pop me kombedi. Voices mapol = dwon madongo ento tiyo ki CPU mapol. Detuning gengo kit ma voices bor kwede — detune mapol = malac/calo chorus, manok = matek/oketo tam.
acholi.an_arpeggiator_plays_the_notes_of_a_ch: 🔬 Arpeggiator goyo notes me chord acel acel i lok. "Up" cito ki piny nio malo, keto teko ma dok malo. "Down" lor pi tam me poto. Rate gengo cient (manok = oyot). Gate gengo kare ma note acel acel kok (100% = legato, 10% = staccato). Tem rate=100ms + octaves 4 + up pattern pi trance arp me con!
acholi.sing_speak_or_play_an_instrument_hear_: Wer, lok, onyo goy instrument — winy effects i kare adaddaa!
acholi.how_effects_change_sound_waves: 🔬 Kit ma Effects Loko Waves me Dwon
acholi.removes_frequencies_above_lowpass_or_b: Kwanyo frequencies malo (lowpass) onyo piny (highpass) me threshold. Calo umo dogi ki cing — kwanyo frequencies malo, keto dwon obed "macol."
acholi.creates_echoes_by_copying_the_signal_a: Keto echoes ki copy me signal ci goyo odoco nge kare manok. Feedback gengo echoes adi ma dwogo.
acholi.simulates_room_acoustics_by_creating_t: Loko acoustics me ot ki cweyo alip me echoes matino ma riibo. Ot matidi = reverb macek, cathedral = reverb mabor.
acholi.clips_the_waveform_peaks_turning_smoot: Ngolo peaks me waveform, loko sine waves mayot obed kite matek, ma tye ki tunge. Man medo harmonics manyen ma onongo pe i dwon me acakki.
acholi.duplicates_the_signal_with_a_slight_co: Copy signal ki delay manok ma loke jwijwi. Man loko voices/instruments mapol ma goyo kacel ma pe rom i kare.
acholi.rapidly_varies_the_volume_up_and_down_: Loko oyot volume malo ki piny, keto effect ma diyo. Dwong i surf guitar ki music me organ.
acholi.use_headphones_when_monitoring_to_avoi: Ti ki headphones i kare me monitoring wek igwok feedback loops! Mic woto i effects ducu malo (filter, delay, reverb, ki mukene) — yub gi wek iwiny kit ma acel acel loko dwoni onyo instrument.
acholi.connect_your_microphone_to_run_your_vo: Rib microphone ni wek ikel dwoni onyo instrument i effects chain i kare adaddaa.
acholi.see_your_voice_as_a_waveform_frequency: Nen dwoni calo waveform + frequency spectrum. Winy kit ma filter, delay, reverb, distortion, ki chorus loko waves me dwon.
acholi.touch_drag_x_pitch_y_filter_effect: Gud & ywai — X = pitch, Y = filter/effect
acholi.the_xy_pad_maps_your_finger_mouse_posi: XY pad ribo ka ma lwet/mouse ni tye ki parameters me music i kare adaddaa. Axis X gengo pitch (tung lacwic = piny, tung lacuc = malo). Axis Y gengo filter cutoff frequency (malo = maler, piny = macol). Man calo instruments calo Korg Kaoss Pad, ma oloko performance me music me electronic i kare adaddaa ki loko gestures 2D obed dwon.
acholi.xy_performance_pad_left_right_is_pitch: XY performance pad. Tung lacwic-lacuc obedo pitch, malo-piny obedo maler me filter. Ti ki arrow keys me wot ki goyo note; dii Escape onyo Space me cung.
acholi.sequencer_drum_pads_notation_samples_m: Sequencer, drum pads, notation, samples & mukene →
acholi.click_cells_to_place_notes_visual_melo: Dii cells me keto notes — editor me melody ma nen
acholi.common_progressions_click_to_hear: Progressions ma dwong — dii me winyo
acholi.chord_progressions_create_emotional_jo: Chord progressions keto wot me tam cwiny. Chord I (tonic) winnye calo 'gang.' Chord V (dominant) keto tension ma mito dwogo i I. Chord vi (relative minor) medo cwer cwiny onyo tut. Chord IV (subdominant) a ki gang mot mot. Kiparo ni progression I-V-vi-IV nen i kato 70% me wer me pop pien poko tam cwiny magi maber.
acholi.roman_numerals_i_ii_iii_iv_v_vi_vii_re: Namba me Roma (I, ii, iii, IV, V, vi, vii°) nyuto degrees me scale. Madit = chord major. Matidi = chord minor.
acholi.add_melody_notes_in_the_grid_above: Med melody notes i grid malo ↑
acholi.click_melody_cells_in_the_grid_above_t: Dii melody cells i grid malo me neno notation kany
acholi.upload_wav_mp3_files_for_custom_pads_s: Cwal files me WAV/MP3 pi custom pads. Samples jwang ka page odwogo manyen.
acholi.chain_patterns_into_a_full_song: Rib patterns i wer ma opong
acholi.add_current_pattern_as_a_section: Med pattern me kombedi calo section
acholi.create_a_drum_pattern_in_the_grid_abov: Cwe drum pattern i grid malo, ci dii "+ Med me Kombedi calo Section" me cako gero wer.
acholi.sections_intro_verse_chorus_bridge_cho: Sections: Intro → Verse → Chorus → Bridge → Chorus → Outro
acholi.no_saved_beats_yet_create_a_pattern_an: Beats mo peya kigwoko. Cwe pattern ci dii Gwok!
acholi.harmonypad_creates_warm_pure_tones_by_: HarmonyPad keto tones malyet, maleng ki riibo sine ki triangle waves. Yer voice, yer chord ki grid ma piny, ci strum plate!
acholi.chord_grid_tap_to_select_space_to_stru: 🎶 Chord Grid — dii me yero, Space me strum
acholi.hear_see_the_waveform_and_learn_the_st: Winy, nen waveform, ci pwony ododo me instrument acel acel
acholi.this_is_how_different_instruments_get_: Man aye kit ma instruments mapatpat nongo dwon gi mapat! Flute en dwong harmonic 1 (sine). Clarinet tye ki odd harmonics (1,3,5,7). Violin tye ki harmonics ducu. Dii me gero timbre ni kekeni!
acholi.karplus_strong_synthesis_creates_reali: Karplus-Strong synthesis keto dwon me strings ma kigoyo adaddaa ki noise burst macek ma odonyo i delay line ma tye ki filtered feedback. Yub maler (rangi me noise me acakki) ki damping (bor me sustain) me yubo kit me string.
acholi.what_type_of_chord_do_you_hear: Kit me chord mene ma iwinyo?
acholi.identify_each_note_in_the_4_note_melod: Nge note acel acel i melody me notes 4:
acholi.fundamental_heavy_gentle_highs_acousti: Fundamental matek, highs mayot. Calo acoustic.
acholi.mid_heavy_without_fundamental_woody_cu: Dye matek ma pe fundamental — calo yat/flute me cuckoo.
acholi.almost_pure_fundamental_muffled_sub_li: Cok fundamental maleng — kiumo / calo sub.
acholi.roughly_equal_harmonics_full_natural_t: Harmonics cok rom — timbre ma opong / me lobo.
acholi.adjust_fundamental_mid_and_high_harmon: Yub rwom me harmonic me fundamental, mid, ki high. Widget poko acel me timbres abic mapatpat. Namba pe, nyutu pe — ywai ci nen.
acholi.hypothesis_free_text_which_harmonic_le: Tam (coc ma thwol): Rwom mene me harmonic keto "maler" ki "malyet"?
acholi.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Mak sliders aryo matek. Ywai acel. Nen.
acholi.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Yeny settings aryo ma keto timbre acel. Proportions mene ma giribo?
acholi.real_instruments_have_characteristic_s: Instruments me ada tye ki spectra me kit. Yeny mumiyo flute winnye mapat ki violin.
acholi.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Angeyo — tit ki lok ni kekeni
acholi.explain_how_harmonic_content_determine: Tit kit ma harmonic content keto neno me timbre.
acholi.design_note_discrete_5_class_timbre_ma: Coc me design: discrete 5-class timbre marker; namba me fidelity me dwon pe; nyutu pe — ki tam.
acholi.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: ki tiyo ki lok mayot me nino ki nino ki ukungu macek, pe jargon
acholi.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: pi lakwan me klas 5, macek ki me mar
acholi.for_a_student_who_already_knows_some_m: pi lakwan ma dong ngeyo manok me music theory
acholi.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Dii "Tit" wek AI tutor otit gin ma view man pwonyo i rwom me kwan ma iyero.
acholi.harmonic_series_why_instruments_sound_: 🎵 Harmonic Series — Mumiyo instruments winnye mapat
